name: restart database
load data
makes knn
make recs
query:
WITH ['Regina Spektor', 'The Strokes'] AS artists

// Step 1: find top 5 rec nodes
MATCH (t:Track)
WHERE t.artists IN artists

MATCH (t)-[:SIMILAR]->(rec:Track)
WHERE NOT rec.artists IN artists

WITH artists, rec, count(*) AS score
ORDER BY score DESC
LIMIT 5

// Step 2: recompute scores ONLY from those nodes
WITH artists, collect(rec) AS topRecs

MATCH (t:Track)
WHERE t.artists IN artists

MATCH (t)-[:SIMILAR]->(rec)
WHERE rec IN topRecs

RETURN rec.track_name, rec.artists, count(*) AS score
ORDER BY score DESC;

name: recs visualization
query:
WITH ['Regina Spektor', 'The Strokes'] AS artists

MATCH (t:Track)
WHERE t.artists IN artists

MATCH (t)-[:SIMILAR]->(rec:Track)
WHERE NOT rec.artists IN artists

WITH artists, rec, count(*) AS score
ORDER BY score DESC
LIMIT 5

// collect the exact nodes
WITH artists, collect(rec) AS topRecs

// Step 2: ONLY use those nodes
MATCH (t:Track)
WHERE t.artists IN artists

MATCH (t)-[r:SIMILAR]->(rec)
WHERE rec IN topRecs

RETURN t, r, rec;
